nodes.title: 8.1 Role Header Format
nodes.text:
<physical_index_5>
## 8.1 Role Header Format

Data Analyst | Company Name (B2C e-commerce, $120M ARR)
City, Country (or 'Remote')

Mar 2021 – Present
<physical_index_5>

nodes.title: 8.2 The Analyst Bullet Framework
nodes.text:
<physical_index_5>
## 8.2 The Analyst Bullet Framework
<physical_index_5>

<physical_index_6>
STRUCTURE: [Action Verb] + [What analysis / model / framework] + [Using what tools] + [Business outcome: $, %, time, decisions enabled]

EXAMPLE: Built a 30-day churn prediction model (Scikit-learn, logistic regression) on 600K customer records, achieving 82% precision, enabling the CRM team to target at-risk users 2 weeks earlier and recover $280K in ARR over one quarter.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.3 The Four Business Impact Dimensions for Analysts
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.3 The Four Business Impact Dimensions for Analysts

- REVENUE IMPACT: 'Identified $X opportunity', 'contributed to $Y revenue lift', 'analysis underpinned a pricing change that generated $Z'. Revenue impact is the most powerful metric on any analyst resume.
- EFFICIENCY IMPACT: 'Reduced reporting time by X hours/week', 'automated Y manual process saving Z person-hours/month', 'decreased analyst effort from 8 hours to 45 minutes'. Shows operational leverage.
- DECISION IMPACT: 'Analysis adopted by exec leadership to justify $X investment', 'dashboard used daily by 12 stakeholders across 4 BUs', 'recommendations implemented across 3 markets'. Shows stakeholder influence.
- ACCURACY / QUALITY IMPACT: 'Improved forecast accuracy from 71% to 89%', 'reduced data discrepancies by 94% through pipeline validation', 'decreased report error rate to zero'. Shows technical credibility.
- When none of the above are available: name the tool, method, scope, and adoption — 'Built an Airflow DAG processing 4M daily transactions used by 3 downstream teams' is significantly stronger than 'worked with data pipelines'.
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.4 Strong Action Verb Bank (Analyst)
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.4 Strong Action Verb Bank (Analyst)

Analyzed • Modelled • Built • Designed • Automated • Developed • Identified • Quantified • Forecasted • Synthesized • Discovered • Investigated • Evaluated • Validated • Standardized • Streamlined • Migrated • Presented • Delivered • Drove • Influenced • Enabled
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.5 Before vs. After — Analyst Bullets
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.5 Before vs. After — Analyst Bullets

|  **XVague (Never Write These)**
Created dashboards for the business team
Worked with sales data to generate insights
Wrote SQL queries to pull reports
Analyzed customer behavior patterns
Helped the team with data-driven decisions
Used Python to process data | **✓ Specific (Write These Instead)**
Built a real-time Tableau executive dashboard tracking 8 KPIs across 5 markets; adopted by the CMO and used in weekly leadership reviews, saving 6 hours of manual reporting per week
Segmented 85K B2B accounts by revenue potential and churn risk using K-means clustering (Python), surfacing a $1.8M cross-sell opportunity actioned by the sales team in Q3
Automated 4 weekly sales and inventory reports using Python (Pandas) + Airflow, eliminating 11 hours of manual analyst effort per week and reducing delivery from Thursday to Monday morning
Conducted cohort retention analysis on 200K users, identifying a 23% drop-off at day 7 that informed a product onboarding redesign, increasing D30 retention by 8 percentage points
Developed pricing sensitivity model using regression analysis that informed a 12% price increase on 3 SKUs, contributing $420K incremental revenue with no measurable churn impact
Cleaned, transformed, and modelled 15M transaction records from 3 disparate source systems in Snowflake + dbt, enabling the company's first unified customer 360 view  |
| --- | --- |
<physical_index_6>

nodes.title: 8.6 Business Analyst Specific: Requirements & Process Bullets
nodes.text:
<physical_index_6>
## 8.6 Business Analyst Specific: Requirements & Process Bullets

- BA-specific bullets should demonstrate structured thinking: requirements gathering, gap analysis, process improvement, and stakeholder alignment — not just data analysis.

Led 12 stakeholder workshops across Finance and Operations to elicit requirements for a $3.2M ERP replacement, producing a 60-page BRD signed off within 4 weeks — 3 weeks ahead of the programme plan.

Mapped 8 end-to-end business processes (BPMN) in Visio, identifying 6 redundant approval steps; process redesign reduced average transaction cycle time from 11 days to 4 days.
<physical_index_6>

<physical_index_7>
PART 9 — HIGH-IMPACT CERTIFICATIONS (Analyst)

9.1 Certifications That Move the Needle

- DATA ANALYST TRACK: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate (widely recognized) | Databricks Certified Data Analyst Associate | dbt Analytics Engineering | Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate | Tableau Desktop Specialist / Certified Data Analyst.
- BUSINESS ANALYST TRACK: IIBA Entry Certificate in Business Analysis (ECBA) | Certified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP) | PMI Professional in Business Analysis (PMI-PBA) | Agile Analysis Certification (IIBA-AAC).
- CLOUD DATA: AWS Certified Data Analytics Specialty | Google Professional Data Engineer | Snowflake SnowPro Core.
- FINANCE-DOMAIN: CFA Level 1/2 (for BFSI analytics roles) | FRM | Financial Modelling & Valuation Analyst (FMVA).
- STATISTICS / ML: Coursera Applied Data Science with Python (University of Michigan) | Stanford ML Certificate (Andrew Ng) — include only if you completed the full specialization and can discuss the content in depth.

MENTORQUE • Data & Business Analyst Resume Blueprint
<physical_index_7>
